title: Blockgame Plus
description: A client-side quality-of-life mod for the Blockgame Minecraft server (1.21.4, Fabric). Trackers, HUD widgets, accessibility tools, a shared team map, and party tools, all in one mod.
body:
# Blockgame+

**Everything you wish Blockgame had, in one client-side mod.** A live team map, a build manager, roll-quality item tooltips, party health bars, leaderboards, a new-player tutorial, and a pile of HUD tools - install it yourself, no server access needed.

Built for the Blockgame Minecraft server (`mc.blockgame.info`) - Fabric, Minecraft 1.21.4.

Visit the site at [bgplus.ca](https://bgplus.ca/)

![banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b86c0615cf5c20b889dc5e3622628e1d1479d415.png)

> **Client-side only.** Drop it in your mods folder and play - most features work standalone. The team map, party sync, and leaderboards use an optional self-hosted backend (more on that below).

---

## 💬 Discord chat bridge

Bridge your community's Discord to in-game chat - messages flow both ways, with player heads on the Discord side. It's a bot you add yourself, no hosting required:

- **[Add the Blockgame+ bot to your Discord server](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1451704640759402588&scope=bot+applications.commands&permissions=536947712)**, then a server admin runs `/setup` in the channel you want bridged.
- Players **link their Minecraft account** (`/link` in Discord, then `/bgplus discord link <code>` in game) so every bridged message shows a verified name - unlinked messages are gently nudged to link first.
- One shared bot serves any community that invites it, so there's nothing to host or configure beyond `/setup`.

Turn it on under **Settings → Community** in-game.

## 🗺️ A real in-game map (and minimap)

No more alt-tabbing. Blockgame+ renders its own **fullscreen map and corner minimap**, drawn from the world as you explore - structures, booty chests, and supply drops all show as live waypoints. Zoom all the way out to the **whole world** thanks to server-built overview tiles, or right-click anywhere to drop a waypoint or a travel destination.

Every player's exploration also merges into one **compounding community map** - a growing, shared web map of everywhere the community has been, with a dark-mode viewer at **bgplus.ca**.

![Community Resource World Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0c3ac3018e18e2703b9204f60a8fabc86346af.png)

![World map with lines active](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa671a209706ddda72d8cfb9fc2832c63810bfa1.png)

![active minimap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56705fb369943b719151679084a8acf0880b370c.png)

## 🧭 Waypoints & exploration routes

- **Custom waypoints** with a right-click menu - name a spot, mark it as your travel destination, or show it as a floating in-world marker you can run toward with no map open.
- **Exploration routes** that draw on the map *and* minimap, with an in-world "go here next" marker, a next-stop readout, and a Focus mode that beelines for a chosen category (e.g. Supply Drops).
- **Booty tracking** auto-clusters nearby chests into structures and labels them, filters by structure type, and hides ones you've already looted. All on the native map - **no Xaero required** (prefer Xaero? One command exports everything to it).

## 🏷️ Item stat tooltips

Blockgame items hide their **true stat rolls** in the item data - the lore only shows rounded numbers. Blockgame+ reveals them:

- A colored **roll-quality `[%]`** on each stat, right on the item.
- Hold **Ctrl** for the full breakdown: exact values, roll-quality bars, and an overall "this item rolled 84% - Great" verdict.
- **Rune-aware and corruption-aware** - it shows the item's *true* base roll with rune bonuses and corruption broken out separately, so you always know what the gear actually rolled.
- **Hold Alt to compare** any item against what you've got equipped, with green/red per-stat deltas. Pin an item to compare two arbitrary pieces.
- Ranges are learned from every item the community sees, so tooltips sharpen as everyone plays.

<!-- SCREENSHOT: an item tooltip with the Ctrl roll panel (bars + verdict) open -->
![Stat mod screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378a610e302524af8bd0657a318a6af23c8185aa.png)

<!-- SCREENSHOT: the hold-Alt gear comparison side panel -->
![Stats compairing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ce1b41063da4a151ccb6d961ce70ad92e98b937.png)

## ⚔️ Talent build manager

The Talents screen becomes a full build manager:

- Save **unlimited** stat builds and switch between them with **one click** - reset and reallocation handled automatically.
- Preview a build client-side, watch your aggregated bonuses update live, then save.
- A small HUD widget shows which build you're running. Press **V** to open Talents any time.

![Talents menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7005362f135b46f46b798075720412a1163e287_0.webp)

## 📊 Stats & trackers

![Stats Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c312e70d688d3b29a9633de3c0dd4c0579d42ae0.png)

- **Loot Stats** - every chest you open, logged and aggregated by dimension and time window.
- **Fishing Tracker** - catches, sizes, personal-best flags, and a leaderboard.
- **XP Tracker** - live profession / proficiency / reputation / class levels with a movable HUD widget and XP-rate display.
- **Coin Counter** - animated balance HUD, spend tracking, and a coins-per-hour rate.
- **Session summary** (`/bgplus session`) - coins, XP, fish, and chests for your play session.

## 🎯 HUD widgets

Every widget is draggable and resizable in the layout editor: cooldown timer, profile-buff timers, booty/supply counters, air/drowning bar, a relocatable action bar, and a chat-channel widget.

![Customizable widgets!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/933ed7698dc00672007639ecb3a9beedc9e6fd36.png)

## 🤝 Party tools

Live teammate **health bars** (a healer's dream), low-health sound alerts, buff icons, client-side glow to spot your party, and **in-world pings**.

![Party Pings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/047969660d60fa1fcd63474c0d4929a327f54ac5_0.webp)

## ♿ Accessibility

- **Spell Cycler** - cast a spell book and auto-advance to the next, with cooldown-aware skipping (tap or hold).
- **Custom sound alerts** for fishing bites, low hydration, loot pings, and party low-health - drop your own `.ogg`/`.wav` files in.

## 🏆 Community & leaderboards

Optional shared leaderboards - class, professions, proficiencies, reputations, coins, and fishing - plus supply-drop and loot sharing. Browse them in-game or on the public site at **bgplus.ca/leaderboard** (no account needed to look).

![Community Leaderboards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07ce2829a134abe5ddd05b7feba5abf3be759e7f_0.webp)

## 🎓 New-player tutorial

First time on Blockgame? Blockgame+ layers a friendly **Guide** over the server's own tutorial quest - a dialogue box explains each step and waypoints point you to the tricky spots (like that Forge everyone gets lost looking for). It turns itself off once you've finished.

<!-- SCREENSHOT: the tutorial Guide dialogue box + a waypoint in-world -->
![starter guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/856e5e3e986ce52a46a056b2a38ab6ac6930e035.png)

## 📌 Teleport Spots

Make your own command buttons - e.g. "Nation spawn" runs `/n spawn`.

![Teleport Spots Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb1036578d6e90c6f6a68ad6ddb2612f568bbb6d_0.webp)

---

## ⚙️ Setup

1. Install **Fabric Loader**, **Fabric API**, **Cloth Config**, and **Mod Menu**.
2. Drop **Blockgame+** in your `mods` folder.
3. All keybinds are unbound by default - set them in **Options → Controls → Blockgame+**.
4. Configure everything in **Mod Menu → Blockgame+**.

![Vast settings menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/788553836c216636f92f775185a43fe6c037a8ed_0.webp)

## ⚠️ Notes

- Designed for Blockgame; features are gated to the server by default.
- The team map, live party sync, and leaderboards use a **self-hosted backend** (provided currently by the mod owner - that's me!). They're not required for the rest of the mod, and they need you to request to join the community so an admin can approve you.
- **Known issue:** party HUD faces currently show the default skin.
- This mod is made with the help of AI. If you don't support that, then don't download! Or do... I don't care.

**Found a bug?** Reach me on Discord: **codyggex**
